**Scope check**

Quay is intentionally narrow: macOS-only, SSH-only, no cloud features, no plugin system. Before filing, please check that the feature fits this scope. Larger expansions (new connection protocols, cross-platform support, sync, etc.) are out of scope for this project — please feel free to fork.
